pi_items.source: Official USITC website - https://hts.usitc.gov/ - confirmed as the official Harmonized Tariff Schedule interactive search database
Official US Customs and Border Protection website - https://www.cbp.gov/ - confirmed as official government tariff and customs authority
USITC HTS Chapter 69 PDF (https://www.usitc.gov/publications/docs/tata/hts/bychapter/1000c69.pdf) - confirmed Chapter 69 covers ceramic products that have been fired after shaping

Multiple tariff databases (Datamyne, Flexport, USITC) confirm HTS code 6912 is the heading for ceramic tableware and kitchenware other than porcelain or china. Specific codes include 6912.00.44 (ceramic mugs and steins), 6912.00.45, 6912.00.48, etc. The pattern 6912.\d{2} matches subheadings under 6912.00
USITC HTS and multiple trade databases confirm Chapter 61 covers articles of apparel and clothing accessories that are knitted or crocheted

USITC HTS database and trade databases (Datamyne, Flexport) confirm HTS code 6109.10 covers t-shirts and singlets of cotton, knitted or crocheted. Specific codes include 6109.10.0004 (men's cotton t-shirts), 6109.10.0040 (women's cotton t-shirts), etc. The pattern 6109.\d{2} matches subheadings under 6109.10
USITC HTS Chapter 85 and multiple tariff databases confirm Chapter 85 covers electrical machinery and equipment, including electric storage batteries

USITC HTS database and trade databases (Datamyne, Flexport) confirm HTS code 8507.60 covers lithium-ion accumulators (rechargeable batteries). Specific codes include 8507.60.0000 and 8507.60.0020. The pattern 8507.\d{2} matches subheadings under 8507.60
Trade tariff databases (Unisco, multiple sources) confirm HTS Code 6912.00.44 (ceramic mugs and steins) has an MFN (Most Favored Nation) general duty rate of 10% ad valorem
Trade tariff databases confirm HTS heading 6109 (t-shirts) has a general duty rate of 7% ad valorem, though specific subheadings vary (e.g., 6109.10.0027 is 16.5%)

Trade tariff databases and CBP rulings confirm HTS Code 8507.60.0020 (lithium-ion batteries) has a general duty rate of 3.4% ad valorem. Additional 7.5% duty applies to products of China origin under Section 301 remedies

privileged_info_summary: The task involves researching tariff classifications from real government sources: the USITC Harmonized Tariff Schedule (hts.usitc.gov) and US Customs and Border Protection (cbp.gov). All metadata claims regarding expected HTS chapters and code patterns have been independently verified. Chapter 69 covers ceramic products including stoneware mugs classified under heading 6912; Chapter 61 covers knitted apparel including cotton t-shirts classified under heading 6109.10; Chapter 85 covers electrical machinery including lithium-ion batteries classified under heading 8507.60. The general duty rates are: ceramic mugs 10%, cotton t-shirts 7%, and lithium-ion batteries 3.4%.
